title: Diagnose a non-reproducible result
description: Isolate whether a changed result comes from package versions, unset seed, or hidden state.
body: Steps: 1. Compare renv.lock against the installed versions for drift. 2. Check whether any stochastic step runs without a set seed. 3. Render in a fresh session to expose reliance on lingering global-environment objects. 4. Diff intermediate outputs to localize where results diverge. 5. Pin the offending factor and re-run. Rollback point: before bumping package versions to match. Validation: two clean-session runs produce identical output.
